topic: There is a voicemail on my phone in my own voice that I never recorded
title: There Is a Voicemail Saved on My Phone in My Own Voice That I Never Recorded | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a voicemail in my voice on my phone. I never made the call.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a voicemail playback interface with a saved message timestamp from yesterday, dim ambient room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: iPhone twelve. Personal line. Six years old. Same number.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a worn iPhone on a wooden desk, the lock screen showing the time and missed notifications, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I check voicemail Tuesday and Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a phone calendar app showing recurring weekly reminders on a screen, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Saw a new saved voicemail. Forty seven seconds. From my own number.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone voicemail list with one new message highlighted, the duration showing forty seven seconds, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a phone close to an ear, only the hand and a partial jawline visible, dim home interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I was reading an address. Then phone numbers. Then names I did not know.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a note pad with handwritten addresses and phone numbers, a phone visible at the edge of frame playing audio, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled my call log. Tuesday afternoon.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone call log showing an outgoing call from the user's own number to itself, Tuesday afternoon timestamp visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had made an outgoing call to myself. From the same phone I was holding.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone call history list with the user's own number visible as both caller and recipient, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wrote down the names. Tried to look them up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a notepad with handwritten names beside an open laptop showing a search results page, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three of the names are missing persons from the city the address is in.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a printed missing persons report on a desk, only the headline and date visible, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have a new voicemail from yesterday.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing a new voicemail notification badge, dim ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Forty eight seconds. Same voice. A different address.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone with a voicemail interface open showing a new message of forty eight seconds duration, dim bedside table light, vertical 9:16 framing
